steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “only left a trembling suggestion of its existence within me” shows that what remains is a faint indication of the soul.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
A trace is a faint mark or indication, which matches the idea of a trembling suggestion left behind.
The other three either mean a personal view, an argument, or an order, none of which convey a faint indication.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
